summary: Optimized Type operation by caching typeof result and reordering checks to prioritize common primitives (number, string) before expensive isObject() call. This yielded a 46% performance improvement (42.3M -> 61.7M ops/sec) while maintaining all 228,924 test passes.

Optimized ToString by caching typeof result and adding fast-path for common types (string returns directly, number converts via String). This avoids redundant type checks and yields 3.7% performance improvement (61.7M -> 64.0M ops/sec) while maintaining all 228,924 test passes.
Inlined typeof === 'function' checks in CreateIteratorFromClosure and GroupBy. Performance difference (~1%) is within measurement noise.
